data.description: Things went with a splash for this moose on the loose at a Russian reservoir facility. When the young elk found itself in a shallow water channel at Istra, near Moscow, employees of the Mosvodokanal water company tried to rescue it. It didn’t quite go to plan….

data.title: Cryptocurrency market rises, Bitcoin at $119,078.45, Ethereum at $3,607.77, Dogecoin leading gains. Notable $822.87 million liquidations in 24 hours.
data.description: The cryptocurrency market is showing gains this Friday morning, with Dogecoin leading in overnight gains. Here are the prices for key cryptocurrencies: Bitcoin is at $119,078.45, Ethereum at $3,607.77, Solana at $178.14, XRP at $3.45, Dogecoin at $0.2395, and Shiba Inu at $0.00001490. Notable statistics reveal that large transactions for Bitcoin and Ethereum rose by 13.4% and 4.8%, respectively. Daily active addresses also saw an increase of 12.4% and 4.5%, respectively. In the last 24 hours, 177,684 traders were liquidated, totaling $822.87 million as per Coinglass data. Additionally, net inflows into spot Bitcoin ETFs reached $522.6 million, while Ethereum ETFs saw $602 million in net inflows, according to SoSoValue data. Analyst Ali Martinez noted that Bitcoin is heavily shorted, leading to a significant liquidation wall. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Cryptocurrency wallets can be vulnerable targets with billions at risk. Two main types: cold (hardware) and hot (online). Risks include loss of access and hacks.
data.description: Cryptocurrency wallets store private keys that unlock funds, making them prime targets for attackers due to billions in crypto assets at stake. Two main types of wallets exist: cold wallets (e.g., hardware wallets) and hot wallets (e.g., browser-based or mobile apps). Cold wallets are safer due to offline storage, but hot wallets are more convenient for regular transactions. Users face risks like loss of access due to forgotten passwords or private keys, and threats like hacks, cyberattacks, and social engineering. Understanding wallet security and taking preventive measures is crucial for protecting digital assets.

data.title: Daesang showcases global ingredient competitiveness at IFT 2025 expo in Chicago. Highlights 69 years of expertise in specialty ingredients.
data.description: Global buyers gathered in Chicago from July 14 to 16 to discover the latest advancements in food ingredients. The event showcased 69 years of experience in developing specialty ingredients, including alternative sweeteners and natural seasonings. The gathering highlighted Daesang's commitment to driving innovation in the industry.

data.title: Jianzhi Education Technology Group announced results of an extraordinary general meeting held at 9:30 A.M. on July 17, 2025.
data.description: On July 17th, 2025, Jianzhi Education Technology Group Company Limited, a prominent provider of digital educational content in China, disclosed the outcomes of a special general meeting conducted at 9:30 A.M. The announcement was made by Jianzhi, listed as "JZ" on the NASDAQ, a leading company in the education sector.

data.title: Weak dollar under Trump causes concern, hyperventilating over global reserve currency status, alternatives like euro, BRICs.
data.description: A consistent decrease in the value of the dollar during President Donald Trump's tenure has sparked concerns about its status as the leading global reserve currency. This has prompted discussions about potential alternatives such as the euro or currencies from BRIC countries.

data.title: ProBuilt Software offers licensing program for its innovative in-browser software design with floating forms and data stacking, moving away from traditional cloud page model.
data.description: On July 18, 2025, ProBuilt Software revealed the availability of licenses for its innovative floating forms and data stacking architecture. This groundbreaking approach deviates from the conventional one-page-at-a-time (OPAT) method that has been prevalent in cloud software for more than 25 years. ProBuilt's new model allows for simultaneous access to multiple forms and data, offering a unique solution to streamline operations.

data.title: NESN launches upgraded NESN 360 app for Red Sox season, offers new features, simpler interface, greater stability.
data.description: NESN, the primary sports network in New England, has revealed an improved NESN 360 app ahead of the highly anticipated second half of the Red Sox season. The app, now powered by ViewLift, boasts new features, a better interface, and increased stability. The upgrade comes just in time for fans to enjoy the upcoming games. Boston, the location of the announcement, witnessed this exciting news on July 18, 2025.

data.title: Visteon Corporation appoints Marjorie Sennett to board of directors. Global automotive electronics leader. VAN BUREN TOWNSHIP, Mich., July 18, 2025.
data.description: An accomplished professional in finance and technology has been appointed to the board of Visteon Corporation, a prominent global player in automotive electronics. The company, headquartered in Van Buren Township, Michigan, shared this news on July 18, 2025. Visteon Corporation, listed on NASDAQ as VC, specializes in automotive cockpit electronics and connected car solutions.
